sprite_data:

// --- 0: Happyface --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01010101,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000110,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00010110,%10101001,%01101010,%01011010,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101001,%01101010,%01011010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10010110,%10101010,%10101001,%01101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10010101,%01010101,%01010101,%01101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10100101,%00000000,%00000101,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00010110,%10101001,%00000000,%00000110,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000110,%10101001,%01010000,%01010110,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10010101,%01101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01010101,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000

// --- 1: Yin-yang --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01010101,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10100101,%10101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000110,%10101010,%10100101,%10101001,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00010110,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%01100101,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100101,%01101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100100,%01011001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101001,%01010100,%00011001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10100101,%01010101,%00000000,%00011001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10010100,%00000000,%00000000,%01011001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%01010000,%00010101,%01000000,%01101001,%00000000
    .byte %00010110,%01010000,%00011010,%01000001,%01100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000110,%10010100,%00011010,%01000101,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00000101,%10100101,%00010101,%01010110,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101001,%01010101,%01011010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01010101,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000

// --- 2: Heart --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01010101,%01010000,%00010101,%01010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101010,%10010100,%01011010,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10100100,%01101010,%10101001,%01000000
    .byte %00010110,%10101010,%10100101,%01101010,%10101010,%01010000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101001,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00010110,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000
    .byte %00000110,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010110,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000101,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01101010,%10100101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01011010,%10010100,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00010110,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000101,%01000000,%00000000,%00000000

// --- 3: Star --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000101,%01000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000110,%01000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00010110,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00011010,%10010000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00011010,%10010000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01011010,%10010100,%00010101,%01010100
    .byte %00000101,%01010101,%01101010,%10100101,%01011010,%10100100
    .byte %00010110,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01010100
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100101,%01000000
    .byte %00010101,%01011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%10101010,%10101010,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000101,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000110,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010110,%10101001,%01101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10100101,%01010110,%10100101,%01000000
    .byte %00000000,%01101010,%01010100,%00000101,%01101010,%01000000
    .byte %00000000,%01010101,%01000000,%00000000,%01010101,%01000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000

// --- 4: RAD symbol --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01010101,%00000000,%00000001,%01010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101001,%01000000,%00000101,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%10101010,%01010000,%00010110,%10101001,%01000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10010100,%01011010,%10101010,%01010000
    .byte %00000110,%10101010,%10100100,%01101010,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00000110,%10101010,%10100101,%01011010,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00000110,%10101010,%10010110,%10010110,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10011010,%10100110,%10101010,%01010000
    .byte %00000001,%01010101,%01011010,%10100101,%01010101,%01000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00010110,%10010100,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00010101,%01010100,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01011010,%10100101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01101010,%10101001,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%10101010,%10101010,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%10101010,%10101010,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01010101,%01010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000

// --- 5: Skull --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01010101,%01010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10101001,%01010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01101001,%01010110,%10010101,%01101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01101001,%00010110,%10010100,%01101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01101001,%01011010,%10100101,%01101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01101010,%10101010,%01101010,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%01101001,%01101010,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00011001,%10100101,%01011010,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010110,%01101001,%10011010,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000101,%10011010,%10101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01101010,%10101010,%10010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%10011001,%10011001,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01100110,%01100110,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01011010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00011010,%10100101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00010101,%01010100,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000

// --- 6: Poo pile --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01010101,%01000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01101010,%01010100,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%01011010,%10100101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01011010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000101,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010110,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01010110,%10101010,%10101010,%01010101,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101010,%10010110,%10010110,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100101,%01000000
    .byte %00000101,%01011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000
    .byte %00010110,%10101010,%10010101,%01010110,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00011010,%10101001,%01010101,%01010101,%01101010,%10010000
    .byte %00011010,%10101001,%01011010,%10100101,%01101010,%10010000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010000
    .byte %00010110,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%01010000
    .byte %00000101,%01010101,%01010101,%01010101,%01010101,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000

// --- 7: Frown --- (mode E, 2bpp, 6 bytes/row)
    .byte %00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01010101,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101001,%01101010,%01011010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%01011001,%01101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000110,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00010110,%10101001,%01101010,%01011010,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101001,%01101010,%01011010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101010,%01010101,%01101010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00011010,%10101001,%01010101,%01011010,%10101001,%00000000
    .byte %00010110,%10100101,%01101010,%01010110,%10100101,%00000000
    .byte %00000110,%10100101,%10101010,%10010110,%10100100,%00000000
    .byte %00000101,%10101010,%10101010,%10101010,%10010100,%00000000
    .byte %00000001,%01101010,%10101010,%10101010,%01010000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%01011010,%10101010,%10101001,%01000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00010101,%10101010,%10010101,%00000000,%00000000
    .byte %00000000,%00000001,%01010101,%01010000,%00000000,%00000000
